title: taraxacum × mesohalobium
intro: Taraxacum × mesohalobium, also known as the saltwort dandelion, is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between Taraxacum officinale and Armeria maritima. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating digestive issues and its potential to reduce inflammation. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including aiding in the relief of digestive disorders, reducing blood pressure, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Taraxacum × mesohalobium can be prepared as herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a popular remedy among herbalists.
